# PartRenderer.PartParameters

**Class**

All the parameters applied to a part, including nested subparts

## Declaration

```swift
class PartParameters
```

## Instance Properties

- **axisValues**: The axis values applied to the part
- **blendedRotation**: After rendering, the blended rotation applied to the part
- **blendedTranslation**: After rendering, the blended translation applied to the part
- **partIndex**: The part index of the part these parameters refer to
- **rotation**: The rotation applied to the part, counterclockwise, in radians
- **subparts**: Collection of PartParameters applied to subparts of the part (if any)
- **translation**: The translation applied to the part
